summary: Comprehensive testing completed for family travel website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend loads correctly but has React Select component validation issues affecting form interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Select.Item components have empty string values causing validation errors
ui_bugs.error_message: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents proper form interaction in trip creation and family member creation

integration_issues.issue: Location dropdown selection fails due to Select component validation

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
All CRUD operations for family, trips, packing lists work
Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
Google Maps integration loads correctly with provided API key
Map page displays with proper styling and legend
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component validation errors by ensuring all SelectItem components have non-empty string values. The issue is in components using shadcn Select where some SelectItem elements are likely being passed empty string values. Review TripsPage.jsx, PackingPage.jsx, and FamilyPage.jsx Select components.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Core functionality works but form interactions affected by Select validation issues
